Two ways to point at a file: (a) "url": a direct PDF link, or (b) "storagePath": a path in a Supabase Storage bucket you uploaded the PDF to via the dashboard, e.g. "corpus/coreknowledge/cksci-g1-animals.pdf". Fill title/grade/subjects so citations and filtering work. Free downloads: coreknowledge.org/curriculum.
